text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out with Agnes Digital shopping for
Umamusume merch, when...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Look at that super long line. What do you
think they're selling?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're not necessarily selling anything, but we
go take a look and find...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Hey! You,
with the big bow! Want to give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you get some kinda Uma merch if you get the
very last ball? If so, I'll pull them all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop Agnes Digital before she throws all her cash
at the clerk and convince her to just try once.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... is this one of those scenes where I get just
one chance, but still get super happy no matter
what I get? Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Despite the slim chances of winning some Uma
merch, I'll give it a spin and pray for something
close!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Show me the Umas!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that slightly off-kilter plea, we both take
hold of the raffle machine's lever and give it a
spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwoooaaa?! We got a holy macker—I mean, grand prize?! Talk about hitting the jackpot!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: We're going on a vacation... Gasp! Do you know what that means?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's a private offline meet-up! We get to spend two whole days together talking about Umamusume in person!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
We can go over everyone we've seen over our
three years together! From the rookie Umas fresh
off their debut to the refined and mature seniors!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
We can stay up all night talking about all our
Twinkle Series memories! After we've finished our
twelve-season run, that is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she really meant it when she said
"all" of our Twinkle Series memories.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That means we've gotta prepare tons and tons of
good memories if we want this to be the best trip
ever.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, can you hold onto that ticket until we're
ready, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In the meantime, I'll become a living photo album
capturing everyone's precious moments!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All fired up to collect more mementos for our
future trip, Agnes Digital starts the year off with
more heat than a hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohh... We got the B prize—I mean the first prize! Quick, hit record! I wanna remember this moment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A deluxe carrot hamburger steak... Nice! I want
something special to go with it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, you. If you wanna make something extra delicious, you need to top it off with a bit of fantasizing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Picture a soft, hearty hamburger steak
surrounded by a throng of peaceful, precious
Umas...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I could eat three whole bowls of rice thinking
about it! Just imagine what I could do with this
hamburger steak with a fantasy like that as a side!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right! I need to get home right away and get
started on this fantasy dinner! You're coming too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Agnes Digital and I enjoy our prize
hamburger steak while she fantasizes about a
round-table feast full of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wow, a whole bushel. It looks like they cleared
out the whole storehouse.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Anyways... Hehehe... The more you look at 'em...
Don't you think these carrots start to look like
Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: For instance... Here, look at this one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It looks slim and tough, but it's probably tender
on the inside... Just like Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And then the smaller one next to it reminds me of
Akebono's collarbone. And the one with all the
leaves is like Fuji wearing a big stage wig... ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh! And if you view this one from a certain angle—yeah, that's so her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her unique skill is being able to see Umamusume
in anything. She carefully observes each carrot
before savoring its flavor.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
One carrot... Well, I was only given one chance,
so I guess that tracks.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nah. I'm well aware of how tough it is to arrange a
raffle.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thinking up the lineup of prizes, procuring the
items, and then arranging them in a display... It's
certainly no cakewalk.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Anyone who thinks they're gonna take home the
one prize that rules them all with just one shot is a
nutcase.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
At the end of the day, simping is about support,
and that's my default state of mind. Yessir...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back to campus, Agnes Digital
appears enlightened as she enjoys her singular
carrot.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Tissues, huh? ...Oh! Maybe they have an
Umamusume design!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, doesn't look like it. They're just plain,
ordinary tissues...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I guess this beats getting random tissues from
someone promoting something on the street...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I hate getting handouts from strangers. Whenever they try, I always just run away. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All that said, a loss is a loss at the end of the day.
Agnes Digital winds up feeling a little down.
